# Scaffolding Agents

Bootstraps the generated repo structure for any new specialist module or
demo output package. Condensed from
`prompts/agents/mdap/domain-specialists-industry/scaffolding/` and
`prompts/agents/mdap/micro-specialists/scaffolding/`.

| File | Role |
| :--- | :--- |
| `project-scaffolding-specialist.agent.md` | Chooses/confirms the canonical layout for a new module |
| `python-scaffolding-micro-specialist.agent.md` | Python-specific `src/<pkg>/` + `tests/` + `pyproject.toml` conventions (this repo's own stack) |
